changelog:
v1.3.1 - Bugfix Release

- Fixed 50+ crashes from missing `mounted` checks after async gaps in chat streaming, programmer screen, general chat, conversation history, and voice generation
- Fixed unsafe `as` casts in app router that could crash on unexpected navigation extras
- Fixed force-unwraps in device control actions (go_back, launch_app) with null-safe fallbacks
- Fixed `late` variable crash in general chat when ImagePromptEnhancer not initialized
- Fixed shared LLM engine accidentally being disposed during local image gen fallback
- Fixed missing `_voiceService.dispose()` in voice gen screen
- Fixed leaked TextEditingController in image gen dialog
- Fixed unawaited launchUrl calls (3 locations)
- Fixed unawaited handleMemoryPressure in app lifecycle
- Fixed memory importJson crashing on malformed input
- Fixed nullable regex groups in memory extractor printing 'null'
- Fixed document I/O, SD server, and document list operations with proper error handling

v1.2.0 - Social Links & Landing Page Polish

- Added Facebook and Instagram social links to landing page footer
- Developer: Christian Keth Aguacito

v1.1.0 - Smart Error Handling & User Guide

- Download counter (private, token-protected stats endpoint)
- Clear instructions when offline with no model - tells you to go online or download a model
- Improved Model Required dialog explains both paths: Cloud AI (built-in NVIDIA keys) or Local Model (offline)
- Settings "HOW IT WORKS" guide explaining Cloud AI vs Local AI modes
- Better error messages in Chat when cloud AI is unreachable
- Better error messages in Image Generation when offline or API fails
- General Chat now detects offline+no-model and shows actionable options before attempting

v1.0.2 - First Release Build

- Release variant APK (minified, shrunk, signed)
- Smaller download size compared to debug builds
- All v1.0.1 features included

v1.0.1 - UI Polish & Auto-Update

- Redesigned General Chat input bar (Gemini-style rounded pill, subtle elevation, paper-plane send icon)
- Redesigned Image Generation input bar with the same polished style
- Cleaner Image Generation gallery (removed double rectangle, plain icon)
- Softer red quota banner with info icon in Image Generation
- Removed redundant 'X/3 today' chip in Image Generation
- Cleaner Drawer header (removed stars SVG icon)
- Improved hamburger menu trigger with a subtle border frame
- Auto-update check on app launch - red badge on Settings icon + dismissible banner on home screen when a new version is available
